1000632611.english: Hehe, I don't think so, you know?
1000632611.korean: 후후, 언니는 그렇게 생각 안 하거든?

1000632612.english: You guys are the talents Labiata chose, you know? You can be a little more confident, okay?
1000632612.korean: 너희는 라비아타가 선택한 인재들이거든? 좀 더 자신감을 가져도 되거든?

1000632613.english: Haha, you heard? What are you going to do now?
1000632613.korean: 후후, 들었지? 이제 어떻게 할 생각이야?

1000632614.english: Actually, there was something I wanted to ask you two. The reason we're unable to move right now is due to a lack of personnel, but
1000632614.korean: 실은 두 사람에게 부탁하고 싶은 게 있었거든? 우리가 지금 이렇게 못 움직이고 있는 건 인원 부족도 있지만,

1000632615.english: Actually, the biggest problem is the communication interference coming from there, right?
1000632615.korean: 실은 저기서 출력되는 통신 방해 전파가 제일 큰 문제거든?

1000632616.english: If I go, can you help me disable the jamming device?
1000632616.korean: 만약 가게 된다면 통신 방해 장치를 망가트려 줄 수 있을까?

1000632618.english: Tiamat? It's our turn to stab you this time.

1000632619.english: And, if you think I might be a burden, then you…
1000632619.korean: 그리고, 혹시 내가 짐이 될거라 생각되면 그땐 네가…

1000632622.english: I've never thought that way, so stop saying that.
1000632622.korean: 난 한 번도 그렇게 생각해 본 적 없으니까, 그런 말은 그만둬.

1000632623.english: The striker team will take the field.

1000632625.english: I think the story with our striker team is over, you know?
1000632625.korean: 우리 스트라이커 팀은 이야기 다 끝난 것 같거든?

1000632626.english: Now it's time to teach those bad kids who are targeting our commander a lesson, okay?
1000632626.korean: 이제 우리 사령관을 노리는 저 나쁜 아이들한테 본때를 보여줄 시간이거든?

1000632629.english: And, the communicator is dead... I don't think we'll be able to communicate with Orca anymore. Tiamat? How's yours?
1000632629.korean: 그리고, 통신기는 먹통이네… 이제 오르카와 통신은 힘들 것 같아. 티아멧? 네 건 어때?

1000632631.english: Wait. Look over there, can you see it?

1000632632.english: The AGSs... are attacking each other, aren't they?

1000632633.english: Uh, what should I do? I have to save the people, and find our commander too...
1000632633.korean: 어, 어떻게 하지? 사람들도 구해야 하고, 우리 사령관님도 찾아야 되는데…

1000632635.english: Something must have happened to the enemy who kidnapped the Commander and everyone, causing them to lose control of the AGS.
1000632635.korean: 사령관님과 모두를 납치한 적한테 무슨 일이 생겨서 AGS의 통제권을 잃어버린 걸 거야.

1000632636.english: This is an opportunity. I'll take these AGSs, so you go find the Commander.
1000632636.korean: 이건 기회야, 내가 이 AGS들을 맡을 테니 넌 가서 사령관님을 찾아.

1000632637.english: Why? Tiamat has superior mobility and firepower, so wouldn't it be better for you to go?
1000632637.korean: 어째서? 티아멧이 기동력과 화력이 더 우수하니, 네가 가는 게 낫지 않겠어?

1000632638.english: And if I were to fail such an important mission, I…
1000632638.korean: 그리고 만일, 그렇게 중요한 임무에 실패라도 한다면 난…

1000632641.english: I will pierce the enemy's heart with the invincible golden spear.
1000632641.korean: 무적의 금빛 창으로 적의 심장을 꿰뚫겠다고.

1000632644.english: What? You know how to smile at me? Today is seriously amazing.
1000632644.korean: 뭐야, 너 날 보며 웃을 줄도 알았어? 오늘 정말 대박이다.

1000632647.english: It's candy. Eating something sweet to replenish your calories before a fight will help you calm down a bit.
1000632647.korean: 사탕이야. 싸우기 전에 열량 보충 겸 달콤한 걸 먹으면 조금 진정 될거야.

1000632648.english: And, I've never once been disappointed in you.
1000632648.korean: 그리고, 난 너한테 실망한 적 한 번도 없어.

1000632650.english: … Hmph! Do you think I won't be able to do it because it's too much pressure?
1000632650.korean: … 흥! 그러면 내가 부담스러워서 못할 줄 알고?

1000632652.english: - It seems Machina has lost control of the AGS. The AGS are in disarray, attacking each other.
1000632652.korean: - 아무래도 마키나가 AGS들의 통제권을 잃어버린 것 같다. AGS들은 서로를 공격하는 등 혼란에 빠져있다.

1000632653.english: - The Magical Team joined, but the situation here was getting increasingly out of control.
1000632653.korean: - 매지컬 팀이 합류했지만, 이곳의 상황은 점점 걷잡을 수없이 돌아가고 있었다.

1000632654.english: …Whew…! All the magical girls in one place!

1000632661.english: In the next life… I hope we can meet as friends!
1000632661.korean: 다음 생엔… 우리 꼭 친구로 만나길 빌게요!

1000632663.english: What should I do? A reward like this in the middle of enemy territory!

1000632664.english: It's the best. Always new and exciting, magical girl!
1000632664.korean: 최고야. 늘 새로워 짜릿해, 마법 소녀!

1000632666.english: - I like being a fan, but right now, getting out of this building is the most urgent task.
1000632666.korean: - 팬심도 좋지만, 지금은 이 건물을 빠져나가는 게 급선무다.

1000632667.english: Are you talking about reconnaissance? Oh, what did I do again…
1000632667.korean: 정찰 말씀이신가요? 아, 제가 또 무슨 짓을…

1000632670.english: - "How long has it been since Hraesvelgr disappeared?" Momo asked.
1000632670.korean: - 흐레스 벨그가 사라진지 얼마나 됐을까? 모모가 말을 걸어왔다.

1000632672.english: I feel an ominous energy down there.
1000632672.korean: 저 아래에서 심상치 않은 기운이 느껴져요.

1000632674.english: - A loud tremor was felt outside. Everyone flinched from the shock, which was so powerful it shook the building.
1000632674.korean: - 밖에서 큰 진동이 느껴졌다. 건물이 휘청일정도의 거대한 충격에 모두들 몸을 움츠렸다.

1000632676.english: - Urgent communication from Hraesvelgr. What on earth is going on?
1000632676.korean: - 흐레스벨그의 다급한 통신. 대체 무슨 일이 벌어지고 있는거지?

1000632677.english: Oh, no! A gas, either friendly or enemy, is rampaging through the building's entrance.
1000632677.korean: 아, 아뇨! 적인지 아군인지 불확실한 기체가 빌딩 입구에서 날뛰고 있습니다.

1000632678.english: - We quickly checked outside the window. An unbelievable sight unfolded before our eyes.
1000632678.korean: - 우린 서둘러 창밖을 확인했다. 그런 우리의 눈앞에 믿을 수 없는 광경이 펼쳐지고 있었다.

1000632679.english: - In the city that had become a mess, Happy… no, Tyrant was running wild.
1000632679.korean: - 난장판이 된 도시에서 해피… 아니, 타이런트가 날뛰고 있었다.

1000632680.english: - Vanilla was desperately circling around Tyrant, trying to stop him.
1000632680.korean: - 타이런트를 막으려 하는건지, 바닐라가 필사적으로 타이런트 주위를 맴돌고 있었다.

1000632681.english: Commander? If we don't stop that beast, the building will collapse.
1000632681.korean: 사령관님? 저 야수를 막지 못하면, 건물이 무너지고 말 거예요.

1000632684.english: - I called Momo and Moonbit with gestures.

1000632688.english: - We increased our speed to escape the building.
1000632688.korean: - 우리는 건물을 탈출하기 위해 속도를 높였다.

1000632689.english: - We had reached the entrance with difficulty. However, right before our eyes, a massive weapon of destruction called the 'Tyrant,' standing over 10 meters tall, was running rampant.
1000632689.korean: - 어렵게 도착한 입구. 하지만 우리 눈 앞에선 높이만 10m가 넘는 거대한 파괴 병기 '타이런트'가 날뛰고 있었다.

1000632691.english: - Tyrant was using its massive body to literally crush the street created by Machina, and
1000632691.korean: - 타이런트는 그 육중한 몸을 이용해 마키나가 구현한 거리를 말 그대로 분쇄시키고 있었고,

1000632692.english: - The city residents were terrified and fleeing desperately.
1000632692.korean: - 도시의 주민들은 겁에 질려 필사적으로 도망치고 있었다.

1000632696.english: Master! Why did you come to a place like this? It's too dangerous!
1000632696.korean: 주인님! 어째서 이런 곳으로 오신 건가요? 너무 위험해요!

1000632697.english: Do not test my patience! You weaklings!!
1000632697.korean: 내 인내심을 시험하지 마라! 나약한 것들!!

1000632699.english: I don't have time to explain right now!

1000632700.english: - Vanilla looked frantic trying to dodge the fierce attacks of the Tyrant.
1000632700.korean: - 바닐라는 사납게 몰아치는 타이런트의 공격을 피하느라 정신이 없어 보였다.

1000632701.english: Commander? It's too dangerous here. Please move out of the way.
1000632701.korean: 사령관님? 여긴 너무 위험해요, 자리를 피해주세요.

1000632702.english: Don't worry. No matter how strong the enemy is, they can't stand a chance against the Warriors of the Moon. Right? Magic Gentleman?
1000632702.korean: 걱정마. 적이 아무리 강하다 해도, 달의 전사들을 상대할 순 없어. 그렇지? 매직 젠틀맨?

1000632703.english: Don't worry too much, Magic Gentleman.

1000632704.english: However, despite Momo and BaekTo's indiscriminate attacks, Tyrant only went on a rampage even more violently.
1000632704.korean: - 하지만 모모와 백토의 무차별 공격에도 불구하고 타이런트는 되려 더욱더 난폭하게 날뛸 뿐이었다.

1000632705.english: - While the Magical Team distracted Tyrant like that, Vanilla ran over to me.
1000632705.korean: - 그렇게 매지컬 팀이 타이런트의 시선을 끄는 사이 바닐라가 내게 달려왔다.

1000632706.english: Master? This is no different from suicide! To save just me, doing this...
1000632706.korean: 주인님? 이건 자살행위나 다름없습니다! 저 하나를 구하려고 이렇게…

1000632707.english: Yes, yes? What did you just say?

1000632708.english: - I grabbed Vanilla's shoulders as she looked flustered.

1000632710.english: I am!! The embodiment of battle and destruction!!

1000632713.english: - The Tyrant's roar filled the entire city.

1000632714.english: - More than that, does the fact that the Tyrant woke up of its own free will mean that Machina's influence in this city has diminished that much?
1000632714.korean: - 그보다 타이런트가 자의로 깨어났다는 것은, 그만큼 이 도시에서 마키나의 영향력이 줄었다는 뜻인 걸까?

1000632715.english: What a shameful day! I will trample you all!

1000632719.english: - Everything is pitch black, and my ears are ringing… What’s going on?
1000632719.korean: - 눈앞이 캄캄하고, 귀는 먹먹하다… 이게 어떻게 된 일이지?

1000632720.english: - I spat out the sand in my mouth and stood up.
1000632720.korean: - 나는 입안의 모래를 뱉어내고 몸을 일으켰다.

1000632723.english: - Mery checking various parts of my body with a worried expression.
1000632723.korean: - 걱정스러운 표정으로 내 몸 이곳저곳 확인하는 메리.

1000632724.english: I'm so glad you're safe, brother... but the entrance has collapsed. I think we're trapped here.
1000632724.korean: 무사해서 다행이에요 오라버니… 하지만 입구가 무너져 버렸어요 우린 여기 갇혀버린 것 같아요.

1000632725.english: Damn it! There isn't enough time to smash all of this.
1000632725.korean: 제길! 이걸 다 부숴버리기에는 시간이 너무 부족한데?

1000632727.english: I'm going to break through the entrance right now!

1000632728.english: Lord, now is not the time for this. Look over there!
1000632728.korean: 주공, 지금 이러할 때가 아닙니다. 저길 보십시오!

1000632730.english: - When we turned around, Machina's agents were rushing toward us with terrifying speed.
1000632730.korean: - 뒤를 돌아보자, 마키나의 요원들이 무서운 기세로 우릴 향해 달려오고있었다.

1000632732.english: - Through a narrow gap, the magical girls and the Tyrant are seen facing off.
1000632732.korean: - 좁은 틈으로 마법 소녀들과 타이런트가 대치하는 모습이 보인다.

1000632733.english: - And, the AGS units, having lost control of Machina, were indiscriminately firing at the citizens.
1000632733.korean: - 그리고, 마키나의 통제를 잃어버린 AGS들이 시민들을 상대로 무차별 난사를 하고 있었다.

1000632734.english: - The Empire of Machina was on fire.

1000632738.english: This burden… is too heavy for me.

1000632739.english: Why did you humans make me like this?

1000632741.english: It's okay. Just start again... again. It'll be a little annoying and a little difficult, but
1000632741.korean: 괜찮아요. 다시... 다시 시작하면 돼요. 조금 귀찮고 조금 힘들겠지만

1000632742.english: The broken paradise can be rebuilt with a new savior.
1000632742.korean: 부서진 낙원은 새로운 구세주와 함께 다시 시작하면 되는 거예요.

1000632744.english: - We barely managed to fend off the agents chasing us.
1000632744.korean: - 우린 우릴 쫓아오는 요원들을 막아내는데 겨우 성공했다.

1000632745.korean: - 하지만 또 다른 사소한 문제가 생겼다…

1000632746.english: Stop right there, terrorist! I will not allow the darkness to leak out!
1000632746.korean: 거기, 멈추시죠 테러범! 이 밖으로 어둠이 새어나가게 허락하지 않겠습니다!

1000632748.english: I’ll take that as a compliment.

1000632749.english: - Phantom and Wraith with triumphant expressions.

1000632751.english: It is you who need to stop. How long do you intend to bring chaos to this city?
1000632751.korean: 멈춰야 할 것은 당신들입니다. 언제까지 이 도시에 혼란을 몰고 올 셈이죠?

1000632752.english: unconditionally agree with what my senior says.

1000632753.english: If we had all lived justly like us, this wouldn't have happened!
1000632753.korean: 모두 우리 같이 정의롭게 살았다면 이런 일은 벌어지지 않았을 겁니다!

1000632756.english: - While Phantom and Wraith were praising each other with eyes full of friendship, I quietly called out to Mery.
1000632756.korean: - 팬텀과 레이스가 우정이 넘치는 눈빛으로 서로를 칭찬하는 사이, 나는 조용히 메리를 불렀다.

1000632758.english: A knife… you mean? I think I could get some attention.
1000632758.korean: 나이프… 말씀이세요? 제가 시선을 끌 순 있을 것 같아요.

1000632759.english: - Now there is only one way.

1000632760.english: What are you planning to do?

1000632762.english: Brother! What on earth are you thinking?!
1000632762.korean: 오라버니! 대체 무슨 생각을 하고 계신 거예요?!

1000632763.english: You pervert! You filthy! Homo sapiens!!!

1000632764.english: … Yes, I understand. Please be careful, brother.

1000632765.english: Excuse me... I know you're busy, but could you take a look over here for a moment?
1000632765.korean: 저기.. 바쁘신 줄은 알고 있지만. 잠시 여길 봐주시겠어요?

1000632766.english: - Mery drew a picture in the air. Phantom seemed to be imagining herself surrounded by her friends.
1000632766.korean: - 메리는 허공에 그림을 그렸고. 팬텀은 친구들에 둘러싸인 자신을 상상하고 있는 듯했다.

1000632768.english: - However, Phantom sliced through the drawing in the air with a single stroke.
1000632768.korean: - 그러나 팬텀은 허공에 그려진 그림을 단칼로 베어버렸다.

1000632769.english: I don't know what you're trying to show me, but I don't need an imaginary friend like that.
1000632769.korean: 뭘 보여주고 싶은지 모르겠지만, 내게 그런 상상친구 따윈 필요 없어.

1000632770.english: Because I already have plenty of friends!

1000632771.english: Our AL Cute has over 1 million followers!

1000632772.english: Hmph! I don't know what your scheme is, but I won't let things go your way anymore.
1000632772.korean: 훗! 무슨 꿍꿍이인지는 모르겠지만, 이제 생각대로 두진 않겠어.

1000632773.english: Stop. Ladies, please step back now.
1000632773.korean: 그만. 두 숙녀분은 이제 물러나 주십시오.

1000632775.english: - Suddenly, with a great shock, my vision brightened.
1000632775.korean: - 순간 큰 충격과 함께 시야가 밝아졌다.

1000632776.english: I have come to rescue you, Your Excellency the Commander.

1000632778.english: Yes, everyone here acted as if they were dreaming, but I never expected that even I, an AGS, would be made to dream.
1000632778.korean: 네, 이곳에선 모두가 꿈꾸는 듯이 행동했지만, AGS인 저마저 꿈을 꾸게 할 줄은 예상치 못했습니다.

1000632779.english: Lamparion? So you came to catch that wanted criminal.

1000632780.english: Your Excellency, Commander. I apologize, but I ask that you cover your ears.
1000632780.korean: 사령관 각하. 죄송하지만 귀를 막아 주시길 부탁드리겠습니다.

1000632781.english: Ah. AL Cute. Today, I have come to tell you the truth.
1000632781.korean: 아아. AL큐트여. 오늘은 진실에 대해 말해주러 왔다네

1000632783.english: Right, actually, this wanted criminal is on the side of justice. We are all being deceived by Mayor Machina!
1000632783.korean: 그래, 사실 이 지명수배자는 정의의 편일세. 우린 모두 마키나 시장에게 속고 있다네!

1000632785.english: No, if that is the case, do you know what crime this wanted person was caught for?
1000632785.korean: 아니, 이 그렇다면 이 지명수배자가 무슨 죄로 잡히는지 알고 있는가?

1000632786.english: For some crime... ... Uh, anyway, Mayor Machina is everyone's benefactor...
1000632786.korean: 무슨 무슨 죄로... ... 어, 어쨌든 마키나 시장님은 모두의 은인이셔...

1000632787.english: Why is Mayor Machina everyone's benefactor?

1000632788.english: That's because it makes everyone happy in paradise...?

1000632789.english: Phantom Black, do you not remember hiding in the archives on the Orca?
1000632789.korean: 팬텀 블랙이여, 오르카호에서 기록실에 숨어 지내던 게 기억나질 않는가?

1000632790.english: Uh... me? That can't be true.

1000632791.english: Snap out of it, Phantom! Your friend Shade is waiting outside!
1000632791.korean: 정신 차리게 팬텀! 바깥에선 자네의 친구 쉐이드가 기다리고 있다네!

1000632793.english: - Phantom seemed confused and was clutching her head.
1000632793.korean: - 팬텀은 혼란스러운 듯 머리를 쥐고 있었다.

1000632794.english: Huh? Huh? Oh, big brother? What should I do?
1000632794.korean: 어? 어? 오, 오라버니? 뭘 하면 될까요?

1000632795.english: I don't know what she looks like, but I'll try to draw her by reading her desires!
1000632795.korean: 어떻게 생겼는지 모르겠지만, 저 언니의 욕망을 읽어서 한번 그려볼게요!

1000632796.english: Hahaha. Phantom, my friend. Open your eyes!
1000632796.korean: 하하하. 팬텀 이 친구야. 눈을 뜨게나!

1000632798.english: Phantom, have you forgotten the adventures we went through together?
1000632798.korean: 팬텀 자네는 나와 함께 겪었던 모험들을 잊은 겐가?

1000632800.english: Then open your eyes! The Commander is waiting for you!
1000632800.korean: 그렇다면 눈을 뜨게나! 사령관께서 자네를 기다리고 있다네!

1000632802.english: Yes, I entrust the Commander to you, my soulmate. Hahaha!
1000632802.korean: 그래, 사령관님을 잘 부탁한다네 나의 소울메이트여. 하하하하!

1000632803.english: - I'm not entirely sure, but Phantom started talking to herself while looking at Shade's drawing, and then stood up again when the drawing faded away.
1000632803.korean: - 잘은 모르겠지만 팬텀은 쉐이드의 그림을 보며 혼잣말을 하기 시작하더니 그림이 스르륵 사라지자 다시 일어났다.
